headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Apollo Global Management, Lowers Price Target to $164
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $165 to $164.
